extraction.one_line_summary: DEMAR Arnaud won on bike throw after chaotic final km sprint where FONDRY nearly crashed and GAVIRIA was taken out
tactical_patterns: Groupama-FDJ controlled with minimal effort for solo breakaway, revealing peloton accepts extreme tempo control on transition stages.
KEMNA contested intermediate sprint at 28km despite 38s GC deficit, signaling bonus seconds prioritized over sprint positioning.

rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: positive: survived chaos after FONDRY/GAVIRIA incidents to launch late, suggesting superior bike handling under messy conditions
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: launched early possibly due to VANLIEBER crash positioning, indicating leadout timing compromised by safety
rider_signals.ROSA Diego: neutral: allowed 4min solo break for intermediate points, confirming breakaway currency devalued on pure sprint stages
